# Feature Charter: Assessment

## Purpose

Review specs for quality and decide how tasks should be executed. Acts as the quality gate between design and planning/implementation.

## Skills

- **adev-review-specs** — dispatches three parallel specialist subagents (structural architect, security reviewer, consistency analyzer) to review specs. Returns PASS / PASS_WITH_NOTES / BLOCK. Planning is gated on passing review.
- **adev-route** — scores tasks on four dimensions (spec completeness, pattern coverage, blast radius, novelty) and recommends `auto-agent`, `assisted-agent`, or `human-only` execution strategy.

## Key Behaviors

- Review must pass before `/adev-plan` can proceed
- Three independent reviewers run in parallel for speed
- Routing prevents over-delegation (risky tasks) and under-delegation (routine tasks)

## Key Files

- `skills/adev-review-specs/SKILL.md`
- `skills/adev-review-specs/structural-architect-prompt.md`
- `skills/adev-review-specs/security-reviewer-prompt.md`
